facts: ServisFirst Bancshares Inc. is a single bank BHC founded in Birmingham, Alabama.
The bank opened a branch in Atlanta, Georgia between 2012 and 2015 as part of its strategic growth across the Southeast.
As of March 31, 2026, ServisFirst operates 35 banking locations across eight states.
In the Atlanta, Georgia metropolitan area, key industries include logistics, media, information technology, education, and entertainment.

Key employers in the Atlanta, Georgia region include Coca-Cola Company, Home Depot, Delta Air Lines, AT&T Mobility, UPS, Newell-Rubbermaid, Cable News Network, Georgia Tech, Lockheed Martin, and Cox Enterprises.
In Huntsville, Alabama, key industries include aerospace/defense and commercial research, with Toyota Motor Manufacturing listed as a key employer.
In Montgomery, Alabama, key industries include automotive manufacturing, with Hyundai Motor Manufacturing listed as a key employer.
In Charleston, South Carolina, key industries include manufacturing, with Mercedes-Benz Vans listed as a key employer.
In North Carolina, key industries include automotive and manufacturing, with Sonic Automotive listed as a key employer.
